content: TASK-051 checkpoint done under TASK-010: sanitized public GitHub repo ai-org-labs/archmap exists and TASK-050 CI typing fix was pushed. The next Pages workflow failed at actions/configure-pages because GitHub Pages was not enabled yet for the new repo. Updated the workflow to call configure-pages with enablement: true and documented the manual Settings fallback if organization policy blocks automatic enablement. Next: push TASK-051 to the sanitized public repo, confirm GitHub Pages deployment succeeds, publish @archmap/core@0.1.0 to npm, and verify jsDelivr CDN URLs. If npm publish asks for OTP/MFA, request it from the human. Keep TASK-011 QIF audit active and run full pattern verification only for routing/overlay/verifier changes or periodic audit.
